mapper.update: UPDATE t_intent SET intent_name = #{intentName}, patterns = #{patterns}, examples = #{examples}, llm_prompt = #{llmPrompt}, required_params = #{requiredParams}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE intent_id = #{intentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, intent_id, tenant_id, intent_code, intent_name, category, patterns, examples, llm_prompt, required_params, risk_level, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_intent WHERE intent_id = #{intentId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, intent_id, tenant_id, intent_code, intent_name, category, patterns, examples, llm_prompt, required_params, risk_level, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_intent WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, intent_id, tenant_id, intent_code, intent_name, category, patterns, examples, llm_prompt, required_params, risk_level, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_intent WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_intent WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
